Title: Test creating a new task
Preconditions: User is authenticated

Test Steps:
1. Call the creaCompito(args) operation with the provided test data
2. Verify that the Compito object is created with the provided data
Expected Result: The Compito object is created with the provided data

Title: Test modifying an existing task
Preconditions: User is authenticated and a task exists
Test Data: id: "task1", name: "Modified Test Task", description: "Modified test description", regione: "Lombardia", provincia: "Milano"
Test Steps:

2. Verify that the Compito object is updated with the provided data
Expected Result: The Compito object is updated with the provided data

Title: Test deleting a task
Preconditions: User is authenticated and a task exists
Test Steps:
1. Call the eliminaCompito(args) operation with the task id
2. Verify that the Compito object is deleted

Title: Test getting a task
Preconditions: User is authenticated and a task exists
Test Steps:
1. Call the getCompito(args) operation with the task id
2. Verify that the Compito object is returned

Title: Test terminating a task
Preconditions: User is authenticated and a task exists
Test Steps:
1. Call the terminaCompito(args) operation with the task id
2. Verify that the task is terminated
